item.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03) ToC
item.description: Comprehensive Table of Contents for the AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification exam, aligned with the latest SAA-C03 blueprint.

item.title: AWS EC2 Autoscaling
item.description: In-depth chapter on Amazon EC2 for AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate preparation, including tasks to gain hands-on experience.

item.description: In-depth chapter on Amazon EC2 for AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate preparation, including tasks to gain hands-on experience.

item.title: Aws Storage
item.description: In-depth chapter on Amazon EC2 for AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate preparation, including tasks to gain hands-on experience.

item.title: AWS Cloud Networking
item.description: In-depth chapter on Amazon VPC and EC2 networking for AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate preparation, with hands-on setup steps.

item.title: AWS CloudWatch
item.description: AWS CloudWatch AWS CloudWatch is a monitoring and observability service that provides actionable insights for applications, system performance, and infrastructure resources. 🔹 Key Features Metrics Collection Collects and tracks metrics from AWS services, applications, and custom sources. Logs Monitoring Ingests, stores, and analyzes logs from applications, Lambda, EC2, and other services. Alarms Set thresholds on metrics to trigger notifications or automated actions. Dashboards Create custom, real-time dashboards for visibility into system performance.
